title: Critical Play
creator: Mary Flanagan
description: A history and theory of games made to question social, cultural, and political assumptions, from folk practices to digital works.
useful: Broadens a design library beyond commercial usability and entertainment goals.
audience: Artists, critics, researchers, and designers interested in games that question social conventions.
learning: Place critical games within a longer cultural history
Recognize play used as intervention and argument
Broaden design goals beyond usability and entertainment
